## Inspect-First Paths

- [GoldenCompass.md](../../GoldenCompass.md) — project brief or longform design doc
- [README.md](../../README.md) — repo overview and entrypoint documentation
- [package.json](../../package.json) — scripts, dependencies, and package metadata
- [next.config.ts](../../next.config.ts) — top-level project area
- [src/](../../src) — primary application source
- [public/](../../public) — static assets served as-is
- [docs/](..) — repo documentation and plans

## Prompting Defaults

- Use explicit file paths, real commands, and concrete acceptance criteria.
- Keep durable repo knowledge in this harness pack; keep task-specific notes in `docs/exec-plans/active/`.
- If `harness validate .` is green and `current-state.md` says maintenance is closed, advance a repo slice instead of choosing harness-only work.
- Prefer positive instructions and repo facts over generic style advice.
